name: Lunalight Kaleido Chick
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>月光彩雛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ムーンライト・カレイド・チック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn: You can send 1 "Lunalight" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck to the GY; the name of this face-up card on the field can be treated as the sent monster's, if used as Fusion Material this turn. If this card is sent to the GY by a card effect: You can target 1 "Polymerization" in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Lunalight Kaleido Chick" once per turn. If this card is banished: You can activate this effect; this turn, your opponent's cards and effects cannot be activated during the Battle Phase.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can send 1 "Lunalight" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck to the GY; the name of this face-up card on the field can be treated as the sent monster's, if used as Fusion Material this turn. If this card is sent to the GY by a card effect: You can target 1 "Polymerization" in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Lunalight Kaleido Chick" once per turn. If this card is banished: You can activate this effect; this turn, your opponent's cards and effects cannot be activated during the Battle Phase.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Sisters of the Rose

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
Sends from Extra Deck to Graveyard for cost
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
